description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His work was mostly in Java (48%), along with Other (35%) and Markdown (16%). The activity data shows 5 projects, but no public repo names or GitHub activity were recorded.
